summary: Comprehensive testing of James Document Creator feature on /documents page. All 14 features tested and verified working. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements present and functional.

1. Two-column layout.evidence: Sidebar width: 200px, main area with James conversational interface

2. James identity bar.evidence: Avatar (J), name 'James', role 'Senior Legal Advisor · 20 years experience', stat pills (847K+ legal sources, US + Belgium), green status indicator with 'Available now'

3. Opening message.evidence: James opening message displays on initial load with examples

4. Suggestion chips.evidence: 4 suggestion chips: 'I need an NDA', 'Create a lease agreement', 'Draft a freelance contract', 'Write a demand letter'

5. Send message and receive response.evidence: User message sent, James responds in French (user language) with questions. Typing indicator shows during AI processing.

6. Browse 158 templates mode.evidence: Template grid with 158 templates, 14 category tabs (All, Employment, Housing & Lease, Business, etc.), search input

7. Generate any document mode switch.evidence: Mode toggle buttons work correctly, switching between conversational interface and template grid

8. POST /api/documents/james/send.evidence: Creates conversation, returns AI response, conversation_id, has_document flag. Full document generation flow tested with 5 messages.

9. GET /api/documents/james/recent.evidence: Returns user's recent generated documents with doc_id, document_title, signature_status, created_at

10. GET /api/documents/james/conversatio.evidence: Returns conversation list with conversation_id, title, created_at, updated_at, document_title, last_doc_id

11. Document Preview Card.evidence: Document generation returns has_document=true, document_content with full NDA text, doc_id. UI component exists with data-testid='document-preview-card'

12. Sign modal.evidence: POST /api/library/sign works, returns pending status with signers. UI modal has data-testid='sign-modal' with signer inputs

13. Download PDF button.evidence: Button exists with data-testid='doc-download-pdf', opens print dialog with document content

14. Template Generate with James button.evidence: Clicking 'Generate with James' on template card switches to generate mode with pre-filled input (e.g., 'I need a Employment Contract (Full-Time)')

critical_code_review_comments: Free plan user test@example.com not seeded in database - cannot test 3-document limit UI. Consider adding to seed script.

context_for_next_testing_agent: James Document Creator feature fully tested. The conversational flow works: user sends message → James asks 3-5 questions → document generated with <DOCUMENT> tags → DocumentPreviewCard displays with Sign/Download/Edit buttons. James responds in user's language (French for Belgian user). Browse mode shows 158 templates with category filtering. HelloSign e-signature integration is MOCKED (returns pending status). Free plan 3-document limit exists in code but cannot be UI-tested without seeded free user.

mocked_apis_list: HelloSign/Dropbox Sign e-signature API - returns mock pending status

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/documents/james/send: Creates conversation, sends message, returns AI response with document if generated
